subcodes.first_line: O Rida! The Lord of Names and Creator of the heavens maketh mention of thee from His Most Great Prison. Verily, the Wronged One calleth out in every [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رضا یذکرک مالک الاسماء و فاطر السماء فی سجنه العظیم ان المظلوم ینادی فی کل
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @rejection of Muhammad, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement
